docs.d1: The quarterly budget review is scheduled for next Friday afternoon.
docs.d2: Alice will onboard the two new backend engineers starting Monday.
docs.d3: We decided to migrate the customer database to a managed cloud service.
docs.d4: The mobile app crash on startup was traced to a null pointer in the auth flow.
docs.d5: Marketing wants to launch the holiday campaign three weeks before Thanksgiving.
docs.d6: Renew the SSL certificate before it expires at the end of the month.
docs.d7: The offsite team retreat will be held at the lakeside resort in October.
docs.d8: Legal flagged a compliance gap in how we store European user data.
docs.d9: Bob is refactoring the payment webhook to add retry with exponential backoff.
docs.d10: The design team shipped the new dark-mode theme for the dashboard.
